mapper.sql: id, code_type, ops_reason_code, ops_reason_desc, gz_reason_code, gz_reason_desc, as400_reason_code, as400_reason_desc, manu_reason_code, manu_reason_desc, purchase_reason_code, purchase_reason_desc, id_deleted, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inquiry_code_config
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inquiry_code_config (id, code_type, ops_reason_code, ops_reason_desc, gz_reason_code, gz_reason_desc, as400_reason_code, as400_reason_desc, manu_reason_code, manu_reason_desc, purchase_reason_code, purchase_reason_desc, id_deleted, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{codeType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{opsReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{opsReasonDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{gzReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gzReasonDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{as400ReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{as400ReasonDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{manuReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manuReasonDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{purchaseReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{purchaseReasonDesc,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{idDeleted,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

code_type = #{record.codeType,jdbcType=CHAR},

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
